notes: Normalize raw Meshy GLBs into scene-ready hero assets. Copy to meshy_import.json, then on the Deck: ./run_cathedral.sh build_meshy_import.py. Paths are relative to tools/blender/. height is the finished real-world size in metres (1 unit = 1 m); color is the flat vertex-color hex baked onto the untextured T2 mesh; decimate (0..1) is an optional extra low-poly pass.
